name: Cocklecakes with Laverbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sieve the flour.
2. Separate the egg into yolk and white.
3. Work the yolk and oil into the flour until you have a thick batter. Gradually beat in water to form the batter. Let it rest for 30 minutes.
4. Whisk the egg-white until stiff. Fold it gently into the batter.
5. Add the cockles, then salt, parsley, and herbs as desired.
6. Heat enough oil in a heavy pan to about two fingers deep.
7. Deep-fry spoonfuls of batter, turning occasionally, until the cakes are golden and crisp.
8. Warm the laverbread with lemon juice.
9. Serve hot with wedges of lemon.
